plugins.cameraPermission: Allow UnFocus to use your camera to scan receipts.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow UnFocus to access your photos to scan receipts.
Allow UnFocus to access your photo library.
plugins.saveToPhotosPermission: Allow UnFocus to save images to your photo library.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow UnFocus to use your location for location-based reminders.

plugins.calendarPermission: Allow UnFocus to access your calendar to sync events.

plugins.contactsPermission: Allow UnFocus to access your contacts to share tasks and lists.

plugins.motionPermission: Allow UnFocus to access motion data for step counting.

plugins.microphonePermission: UnFocus uses the microphone so you can record voice notes.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow UnFocus to convert your voice notes into text.

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: UnFocus uses the microphone so you can record voice notes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: UnFocus can add a receipt photo from your library so you can scan it.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: UnFocus can save receipt photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: UnFocus uses your local network to sync tasks and lists directly with a paired device nearby — nothing leaves your Wi-Fi.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow UnFocus to use your location for location-based reminders.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Allow UnFocus to access your calendar to sync events.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Allow UnFocus to access your calendar to sync events.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Allow UnFocus to access your contacts to share tasks and lists.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Allow UnFocus to access motion data for step counting.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow UnFocus to convert your voice notes into text.
